revision.text: This is my bot. I am transitioning to using this account once I am finished the current operations and github actions to make things clear about what is going on and making things more clear and auditable.

This is my bot. I am transitioning to using this account once I am finished the current operations and github actions to make things clear about what is going on and making things more clear and auditable.
See the git repo https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
The bot will periodically update its own userpage as a part of the Github actions loop. This is the initial page for the bot that exists to explain what it is.
The git repo contains most if not all scripts used in the history of the wiki. Most if not all scripts were done by python command line.

This is my bot. I am transitioning to using this account once I am finished the current operations and github actions to make things clear about what is going on and making things more clear and auditable.
See the git repo https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
The bot will periodically update its own userpage as a part of the Github actions loop. This is the initial page for the bot that exists to explain what it is.
The git repo contains most if not all scripts used in the history of the wiki. Most if not all scripts were done by python command line.
== Tasks ==
See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki
=== Current tasks ===
* Four current tasks ** normalize talk pages ** normalize category pages ** delete jawiki resolution pages (wikidata links cover this) ** remove crud categories
=== Future tasks === * Normalization of template categories * fix [[:Category:Erroneous qid category links]]

revision.comment: Added github todo.md content
revision.text: This is my bot. I am transitioning to using this account once I am finished the current operations and github actions to make things clear about what is going on and making things more clear and auditable. See the git repo https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts The bot will periodically update its own userpage as a part of the Github actions loop. This is the initial page for the bot that exists to explain what it is. The git repo contains most if not all scripts used in the history of the wiki. Most if not all scripts were done by python command line. == github tasks == == Immediate / in progress == * '''Crud category cleanup''' — remove_crud_categories.py running (2026-02-25); stripping [[Category:X]] tags from all member pages across 112 subcategories of Category:Crud_categories. No state file; safe to re-run (skips already-empty categories automatically). * '''Delete Category:Jawiki_resolution_pages'''— complete (2026-02-26). 10,239 pages deleted by delete_jawiki_resolution_pages.py. * '''Category page wikitext normalization''' — complete (2026-02-26). 23,571 of 24,045 category pages edited by normalize_category_pages.py. State file preserved for safe re-runs. * '''Talk page migration''' — migrate_talk_pages.py --apply running (2026-02-25); rebuilds every talk page into a clean structure and imports discussion seeds from ja/en/simple Wikipedia via QID sitelinks. State file: shinto_miraheze/migrate_talk_pages.state (201+ pages done). Log: shinto_miraheze/migrate_talk_pages.log. * '''History merges''' — 184 pairs merged (2026-02-23). Combined revision histories of old-name and new-name pages for all matched {{moved to}}/{{moved from}} pairs. 7 edge cases left unresolved; tagged in Category:move templates that do not link to each other for manual review. History fully preserved except for those marginal pages. * '''Re-run resolve_duplicated_qid_categories.py''' — complete (2026-02-23). Only 3 pages remained; all were duplicate Latin-name pairs tagged as erroneous. The ~75 expected remainder had already been resolved by intervening script passes. * '''[[sn:...]] interwiki removal''' — complete (1 page, 3 links). * '''Wanted categories created''' — 153 pages created. * '''Category:Generated_x-no-miya_listsdeleted''' — 67 User namespace pages deleted. * '''Template:Talk page header''' Edit this template so that it fits all of our requirements for our new migrated/transformed talk pages. == Tasks == See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki === Current tasks === * Four current tasks ** normalize talk pages ** normalize category pages ** delete jawiki resolution pages (wikidata links cover this) ** remove crud categories === Future tasks === * Normalization of template categories * fix [[:Category:Erroneous qid category links]]

This is my bot. I am transitioning to using this account once I am finished the current operations and github actions to make things clear about what is going on and making things more clear and auditable. See the git repo https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts The bot will periodically update its own userpage as a part of the Github actions loop. This is the initial page for the bot that exists to explain what it is. The git repo contains most if not all scripts used in the history of the wiki. Most if not all scripts were done by python command line. The bot will also edit the main page to announce its tasks periodically. The intention of it is that the bot will focus on making this wiki a lot more human readable and editable. As per documentation in the repo, the wiki was made very difficult to read and edit as a human because of conflicting design goals. This last push of editing exists to clean up wiki content before we can simplify it for human users. == github tasks == == Immediate / in progress == * '''Crud category cleanup''' — remove_crud_categories.py running (2026-02-25); stripping [[Category:X]] tags from all member pages across 112 subcategories of Category:Crud_categories. No state file; safe to re-run (skips already-empty categories automatically). * '''Delete Category:Jawiki_resolution_pages'''— complete (2026-02-26). 10,239 pages deleted by delete_jawiki_resolution_pages.py. * '''Category page wikitext normalization''' — complete (2026-02-26). 23,571 of 24,045 category pages edited by normalize_category_pages.py. State file preserved for safe re-runs. * '''Talk page migration''' — migrate_talk_pages.py --apply running (2026-02-25); rebuilds every talk page into a clean structure and imports discussion seeds from ja/en/simple Wikipedia via QID sitelinks. State file: shinto_miraheze/migrate_talk_pages.state (201+ pages done). Log: shinto_miraheze/migrate_talk_pages.log. * '''History merges''' — 184 pairs merged (2026-02-23). Combined revision histories of old-name and new-name pages for all matched {{moved to}}/{{moved from}} pairs. 7 edge cases left unresolved; tagged in Category:move templates that do not link to each other for manual review. History fully preserved except for those marginal pages. * '''Re-run resolve_duplicated_qid_categories.py''' — complete (2026-02-23). Only 3 pages remained; all were duplicate Latin-name pairs tagged as erroneous. The ~75 expected remainder had already been resolved by intervening script passes. * '''[[sn:...]] interwiki removal''' — complete (1 page, 3 links). * '''Wanted categories created''' — 153 pages created. * '''Category:Generated_x-no-miya_listsdeleted''' — 67 User namespace pages deleted. * '''Template:Talk page header''' Edit this template so that it fits all of our requirements for our new migrated/transformed talk pages. == Tasks == See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki === Current tasks === * Four current tasks ** normalize talk pages ** normalize category pages ** delete jawiki resolution pages (wikidata links cover this) ** remove crud categories === Future tasks === * Normalization of template categories * fix [[:Category:Erroneous qid category links]]

revision.comment: Bot: update pipeline run status [https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22479568317 commit triggered pipeline]
revision.text: This is the operational bot account used for automated maintenance on shinto.miraheze.org. Its purpose is to run repeatable cleanup and migration tasks with transparent logging, persistent state files, and auditable edit summaries tied to GitHub Actions workflow runs. Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts == Operations policy == I, Emma Leonhart, am committed to CI-first bot operations. I do not run normal mass-edit jobs from my local computer anymore. Routine and major automated edits are implemented by changing the GitHub repository and executed through GitHub Actions. Local manual script runs are reserved for emergency intervention only. == Immediate / in progress == * '''Unused category deletion (with safeguard)''' — delete_unused_categories.py runs first in the GitHub Actions loop and deletes pages listed in Special:UnusedCategories, except pages containing {{Possibly empty category}}. This is part of post-crud cleanup and is expected to run repeatedly over multiple days as category cleanup progresses. * '''Crud category cleanup''' â€” remove_crud_categories.py running (2026-02-25); stripping [[Category:X]] tags from all member pages across 112 subcategories of Category:Crud_categories. Now runs in GitHub Actions with --max-edits cap and is expected to take several days of automated runs. * '''Talk page migration''' â€” migrate_talk_pages.py --apply running (2026-02-25); rebuilds every talk page into a clean structure and imports discussion seeds from ja/en/simple Wikipedia via QID sitelinks. State file: shinto_miraheze/migrate_talk_pages.state. Log: shinto_miraheze/migrate_talk_pages.log. Now runs in GitHub Actions with --max-edits cap and is expected to take several days of automated runs. * '''Template:Talk page header''' - Edit this template so that it fits all requirements for migrated/transformed talk pages. == Tasks == See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki. === Current tasks === * normalize talk pages * normalize category pages * remove crud categories * fix erroneous QID category links === Future tasks === * normalization of template categories * fix [[:Category:Erroneous qid category links]] == Bot run status == * Last pipeline start (UTC): 2026-02-27T08:56:57Z * Trigger: push: "Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts" (565e7aa) * Workflow run: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22479568317

This is the operational bot account used for automated maintenance on shinto.miraheze.org.
Its purpose is to run repeatable cleanup and migration tasks with transparent logging, persistent state files, and auditable edit summaries tied to GitHub Actions workflow runs.
Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
== Operations policy ==
I, Emma Leonhart, am committed to CI-first bot operations. I do not run normal mass-edit jobs from my local computer anymore. Routine and major automated edits are implemented by changing the GitHub repository and executed through GitHub Actions. Local manual script runs are reserved for emergency intervention only.

=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * fix [[:Category:Erroneous qid category links]]

=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * fix [[:Category:Erroneous qid category links]]

Its purpose is to run repeatable cleanup and migration tasks with transparent logging, persistent state files, and auditable edit summaries tied to GitHub Actions workflow runs.
Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
== Operations policy ==
All routine bot edits run through '''GitHub Actions''', not from a local machine. Scripts are committed to the repository and triggered automatically or via manual dispatch. Local runs are only used for emergencies.
== Immediate / in progress == <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:START --> * No immediate tasks listed in TODO.md <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:END -->
== Tasks ==
See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki.
=== Current tasks ===
* normalize talk pages * normalize category pages * remove crud categories * triage [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] into [[:Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] and [[:Category:Emmabot categories without enwiki]]
=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * enrich [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] subcategories with proper content <!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:START --> == Bot run status == * Workflow status: '''active''' * Current stage: '''Cleanup Loop: delete_unused_categories''' * Last pipeline start (UTC): 2026-03-13T00:58:54Z * Trigger: push: "Add enwiki XML reimport workflow to fix erroneous transclusions" (9ddc369) * Workflow run: https://github.com/EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23030838484<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:END -->

revision.comment: Bot: stage → Cleanup Loop: migrate_talk_pages [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23030838484|commit triggered pipeline]]

This is the operational bot account used for automated maintenance on shinto.miraheze.org.
Its purpose is to run repeatable cleanup and migration tasks with transparent logging, persistent state files, and auditable edit summaries tied to GitHub Actions workflow runs.
Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
== Operations policy ==
All routine bot edits run through '''GitHub Actions''', not from a local machine. Scripts are committed to the repository and triggered automatically or via manual dispatch. Local runs are only used for emergencies.
== Immediate / in progress == <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:START --> * No immediate tasks listed in TODO.md <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:END -->
== Tasks ==
See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki.
=== Current tasks ===
* normalize talk pages * normalize category pages * remove crud categories * triage [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] into [[:Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] and [[:Category:Emmabot categories without enwiki]]
=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * enrich [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] subcategories with proper content <!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:START --> == Bot run status == * Workflow status: '''active''' * Current stage: '''Core Loop: triage_emmabot_categories_secondary''' * Last pipeline start (UTC): 2026-03-13T02:56:18Z * Trigger: push: "Update DEVLOG, TODO, and SCRIPTS with reimport workflow and orphaned talk pages" (8087d0a) * Workflow run: https://github.com/EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23034089081<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:END -->

Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
== Operations policy ==
All routine bot edits run through '''GitHub Actions''', not from a local machine. Scripts are committed to the repository and triggered automatically or via manual dispatch. Local runs are only used for emergencies.
== Immediate / in progress == <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:START --> * No immediate tasks listed in TODO.md <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:END -->
== Tasks ==
See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki.
=== Current tasks ===
* normalize talk pages * normalize category pages * remove crud categories * triage [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] into [[:Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] and [[:Category:Emmabot categories without enwiki]]
=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * enrich [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] subcategories with proper content <!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:START --> == Bot run status == * Workflow status: '''active''' * Current stage: '''Deprecated: fix_erroneous_qid_category_links''' * Last pipeline start (UTC): 2026-03-13T09:02:54Z * Trigger: manual run by EmmaLeonhart * Workflow run: https://github.com/EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23043689808<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:END -->

Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
== Operations policy ==
All routine bot edits run through '''GitHub Actions''', not from a local machine. Scripts are committed to the repository and triggered automatically or via manual dispatch. Local runs are only used for emergencies.
== Immediate / in progress == <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:START --> * No immediate tasks listed in TODO.md <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:END -->
== Tasks ==
See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki.
=== Current tasks ===
* normalize talk pages * normalize category pages * remove crud categories * triage [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] into [[:Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] and [[:Category:Emmabot categories without enwiki]]
=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * enrich [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] subcategories with proper content <!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:START --> == Bot run status == * Workflow status: '''active''' * Current stage: '''Core Loop: generate_p11250_quickstatements''' * Last pipeline start (UTC): 2026-03-15T01:24:38Z * Trigger: scheduled daily run * Workflow run: https://github.com/EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23100572874<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:END -->

This is the operational bot account used for automated maintenance on shinto.miraheze.org, it is also used on lifeism.miraheze.org and aelaki.miraheze.org
Its purpose is to run repeatable cleanup and migration tasks with transparent logging, persistent state files, and auditable edit summaries tied to GitHub Actions workflow runs.
Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
== Operations policy ==
All routine bot edits run through '''GitHub Actions''', not from a local machine. Scripts are committed to the repository and triggered automatically or via manual dispatch. Local runs are only used for emergencies.
== Immediate / in progress == <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:START --> * No immediate tasks listed in TODO.md <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:END -->
== Tasks ==
See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki.
=== Current tasks ===
* normalize talk pages * normalize category pages * remove crud categories * triage [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] into [[:Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] and [[:Category:Emmabot categories without enwiki]]
=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * enrich [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] subcategories with proper content <!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:START --> == Bot run status == * Workflow status: '''active''' * Current stage: '''Core Loop: triage_emmabot_categories_secondary''' * Last pipeline start (UTC): 2026-03-21T00:26:29Z * Trigger: manual run by EmmaLeonhart * Workflow run: https://github.com/EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23367905411<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:END -->

Repository: https://github.com/Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts
== Operations policy ==
All routine bot edits run through '''GitHub Actions''', not from a local machine. Scripts are committed to the repository and triggered automatically or via manual dispatch. Local runs are only used for emergencies.
== Immediate / in progress == <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:START --> * No immediate tasks listed in TODO.md <!-- BOT-IMMEDIATE:END -->
== Tasks ==
See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki.
=== Current tasks ===
* normalize talk pages * normalize category pages * remove crud categories * triage [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] into [[:Category:Emmabot categories with enwiki]] and [[:Category:Emmabot categories without enwiki]]
=== Future tasks ===
* normalization of template categories * enrich [[:Category:Categories autocreated by EmmaBot]] subcategories with proper content
<!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:START --> == Bot run status == * Workflow status: '''inactive''' * Current stage: '''Complete''' * Last pipeline start (UTC): 2026-03-21T20:24:28Z * Trigger: scheduled daily run * Workflow run: https://github.com/EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069 <!-- BOT-RUN-STATUS:END -->
